hero.desc: CareLink connects families with verified caregivers and trusted specialists — all in one platform, anywhere in the world.

howItWorks.title: Simple. Fast. Trusted.
howItWorks.desc: Three steps to connect with the right care professional in your area.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Describe the care you need — daily assistance, medical support, or specialist advice.
howItWorks.step2Desc: We match you with verified professionals nearby based on qualifications and reviews.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Confirm your booking and pay securely. Funds are released only after service is complete.

services.title: One Platform, Every Care Need
services.desc: From daily caregiving to complex estate matters — CareLink covers the full journey.

care.title: Caregiver Matching
care.desc: Find certified caregivers for your loved ones. Background-checked, reviewed, and ready to help.

estate.title: Estate & Inheritance
estate.desc: Connect with trusted attorneys, tax advisors, and estate planners for professional guidance.

cta.title: Ready to Find the Right Care?
cta.desc: Join thousands of families and caregivers already on CareLink.

caregiverProfile.locationError: Could not get location. Please enter manually.

favorites.emptyDesc: Save caregivers you like with the ♡ button

partners.heroTitle:
Connect Your Expertise
With Those Who Need It
partners.heroSubtitle: CareLink connects caregivers and specialists with families seeking care — all in one trusted platform. Free to join.
partners.step1Desc: Add your license, experience, region and specialties. Takes only 3 minutes.
partners.step2Desc: Families find your profile and send consultation requests directly.
partners.step3Desc: Accept requests, reply, and begin providing care — all in the app.
partners.benefit1Desc: No registration fee. Create your profile and get discovered immediately.
partners.benefit2Desc: Accept, decline and reply to consultation requests — all in one place.
partners.benefit3Desc: Verified reviews grow your reputation and boost search ranking automatically.
partners.benefit4Desc: Korean, English, Japanese, Chinese support — reach a diverse client base.
partners.whoSubtitle: From caregivers to legal specialists — all care professionals are welcome
partners.roadmapSubtitle: CareLink grows with its partners. Here's what's coming.
partners.ctaDesc: Registration is free and takes only 3 minutes. Create your profile and meet your first client.
partners.faq1A: No. Profile registration, consultation management, and reviews are completely free. When we introduce payments, partner benefits will be prioritized.
partners.faq2A: Caregivers, social workers, nurses, therapists, legal and tax professionals — any care-related expert is welcome.
partners.faq3Q: Do I need a license to register?
partners.faq3A: You can register by entering your license number. When the official verification badge system launches, verified partners will receive extra benefits.
partners.faq4Q: Am I visible immediately after joining?
partners.faq4A: Yes. Once your profile is complete, you appear immediately in expert search results.
